opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My back is absolutely radiating heat, and the skin feels so tight it might snap if I move.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: I got badly sunburnt at the beach and the pain is stopping me sleeping.

symptom_narrative.onset: 5 hours ago after prolonged unprotected sun at the beach
symptom_narrative.character: uniform hot, tender red skin, tight/drawing sensation
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: shoulders, upper back, back of neck
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: clear tan-line demarcation; NO blisters, no headache/confusion, no nausea/vomiting, no fever/chills
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: painful to move or let the back touch anything

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; prolonged unprotected UV exposure

objective_data_offered.value: uniform bright red, dry, hot skin over shoulders/upper back with a clear tan line, no blisters, blanches on pressure, visible on video
